title: Korea Voxel Train Pack
description: Korea Voxel Trains for Immersive Railroading
body:
Korea Voxel Trains for Immersive Railroading
adding korea trains in voxel style for Immersive Railroading mod


REQUIRES (필요한 모드) :

Immersive Railroading -
https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-railroading

Track API -
https://modrinth.com/mod/track-api

Universal Mod Core - 
https://modrinth.com/mod/universal-mod-core



INSTALL(설치방법 2가지 있음) :

01. Use Config Folder (recommand)

Client:
.minecraft\config\immersiverailroading\Korea Voxel Train Pack v026-light.zip
Server:
Server Folde\config\immersiverailroading\Korea Voxel Train Pack v026-light.zip


02. If resourcepackings are applied, (리소스팩폴더에 적용할 경우)

Client: 
.minecraft\resourcepacks\Korea Voxel Train Pack v026-light.zip
Resource-pack must be applied in-game (인게인내에서 리소프팩을 적용해야됨)

Server:
Server Folder\resourcepacks\Korea Voxel Train Pack v026-light.zip
(server.properties=리소스프 팩이름을 작성해야됨)
server.properties file (open notepad)
resource-pack=Korea Voxel Train Pack v026-light.zip 

 
 About
You can find a variety of trains manufactured in Korea.
We focus on the appearance first, so the interior is incomplete.
Train speed and acceleration set at random for convenience Change tone weight to kg (00 removed)
Re-calibrated in the future. enjoy~!

한국에서 제조된 다양한 열차를 찾아 볼 수 있습니다.
외형을 우선으로 제작하고 있어 내부 인테리어는 미완성입니다.
열차의 속도및 가속은 편의를 위해 보정되었습니다 톤중량을 kg로 바꿈(00제거)
추후 재보정예정. 즐거운 시간 되세요.


 
CONTAINS(열차 종류):

KORAIL Class 7500 Diesel Locomotive - GT26CW (7500호대 디젤 기관차 - GT26CW)
KTX-1
KTX-Sancheon (KTX-산천)
KTX-EUM (KTX-이음)
ITX-MAUM (ITX-마음)
EMU-320 
Hearang-HEP (해랑 발전차)
K-HPT (K-수소열차)
Tyrant Cafe (폭군의 카페열차)
Mugunghwa-Broadcasting
Mugunghwa-Limit
Mugunghwa-Normal-01
Mugunghwa-Normal-02
ROK TANSCOM-FlatCar (수송사령부 평판차)
ROK TANSCOM-FlatCar with K-9 Thunder (K-9 탑재 수송사령부 평판차)


Important
If none of our trains are appearing in game, make sure you've activated the pack in the resource packs menu.
If your train items are broken, try turning off OptiFine's FastRender option.
If you want to drive trains without fueling them, you can enter IR's config in-game by pressing numpad / -> balance -> FuelRequired = False
If you need help with anything else feel free to ask on our discord in the #support channel
If you can't see all the trains, Change the view distance of the server file. But it's overloaded (view-distance=16)
Our project is compatibile with other voxel style resourcepacks

Mode pack, YouTube video is possible
